title: Portfolio-Level Volatility Target Enforcer
summary: Adds a portfolio-level volatility scalar that computes a 21-day exponentially weighted realised volatility estimate for the portfolio's equity curve, then scales all new position sizes by (target_vol / realised_vol), capped at 1.5x leverage. When markets are calm, the multiplier slightly increases exposure; when volatility spikes (as in March 2020 or August 2024), it automatically reduces all new sizing before the next bar. This is distinct from the archived ATR Volatility-Targeting Position Size Layer, which was per-instrument ATR-based — this feature operates at the portfolio equity curve level using exponentially weighted variance. The Springer Nature 2025 paper adds the crucial insight that a rebalancing band (±4%) eliminates unnecessary transaction costs without sacrificing risk control.
expected_impact: Man Group / Research Affiliates research shows volatility-targeted equity portfolios improve Sharpe ratios vs unscaled portfolios, reduce left-tail severity, and produce smoother equity curves with volatility-of-volatility significantly reduced; PHBS working paper (1990–2023) shows Sharpe improvement from 1.54 to 1.76 for volatility-managed portfolios
